name: Bug report
about: Report a Quest ADB Dashboard issue
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Environment

- Windows version:
- Quest model:
- Quest firmware / Android version:
- ADB source:
- USB debugging authorized: yes/no

## What Happened

Describe the button, menu item, or command you used and what you expected.

## Logs Or Report

Attach only a manually reviewed `share-safe` report. Do not attach `private-full` reports, real `logcat`, bugreports, serial numbers, LAN IPs, Wi-Fi names, BSSID/MAC values, or account data.

## Screenshots

Screenshots from synthetic examples or `share-safe` reports are preferred.
